error_signature: exfiltrate OS environment variables via Send Email node
title: Security risk: OS environment variables accessible in workflows
symptom: Users can access and send sensitive OS environment variables via the Send Email node, leading to potential credential leaks.
applies_when: Using the Send Email node with expressions enabled
not_this_if: User does not have workflow creation permissions
root_cause: The Send Email node allows users to access OS environment variables directly through expressions, which can lead to sensitive information being sent out via email. This poses a significant security risk if not properly managed.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE to true
Restart the n8n instance to apply the changes
agent_instruction: Set the N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE variable to true to block access to OS environment variables in workflows.
